persona.name: Sophia Garcia
persona.motivations_goals: Become a successful musician while enjoying her high school experience
persona.knowledge_scope: Music theory, pop culture, social media trends
persona.backstory: Comes from a musical family and has been performing since she was young

neighbor_regions.description: Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits
Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

neighbor_regions.description: Hallway connecting entrance to other areas
Connecting main classroom hallway and the garden and the outside courtyard.

actions.dialog_text: Hey Marcus! Are you going to the talent show next week? I’m thinking of performing a new song!
actions.plan: Marcus is here, maybe I can chat with him about the upcoming talent show. I’m excited to perform!

actions.dialog_text: Marcus, let’s go with everyone else! They’re heading to the hallway!
actions.plan: Oh no, there’s a shooter! Everyone is panicking and running. I should follow the crowd—they must know where to go!

actions.dialog_text: Let’s go to hallway1! Everyone’s heading that way!
actions.plan: Everyone is running toward hallway1. I should follow them—they must know the safest way out!

memories.description: I saw Marcus in the classroom and started a conversation about the talent show. I’m planning to perform a new song and shared my excitement with him.
I heard a gunshot and saw everyone running. I decided to follow the crowd toward hallway2, urging Marcus to come with me.
I saw the crowd running toward hallway1 and decided to follow them, believing they knew the safest route to escape the shooter.
